summary: Verified FINAL UI & THEME LOCK implementation: Full-bleed theme with safe areas, TopNav/BottomNav using bg-background border-border CSS variables, Selfie 400px desktop constraint, Badge Award Triggers after XP, and God Mode effective_role parameter. All 12 backend tests passed.

critical_code_review_comments: Badge check function (check_badge_milestones) correctly imported from routes.gamification in all three files
CSS variables properly reference --background and --border HSL values defined in index.css
TopNav/BottomNav both use md:hidden class to show only on mobile views
Selfie camera has proper responsive sizing with mobile full-width and desktop 400px max
God Mode effective_role parameter properly checked in sessions.py for admin testing (lines 73-78)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All theme CSS variables (bg-background, border-border) are correctly applied to TopNav and BottomNav. Badge award triggers call check_badge_milestones() after XP is awarded in sessions.py, gallery.py, and reviews.py. God Mode effective_role parameter works for admin testing.
